bio_en: Alumni of AI4Rad Lab. Received a Master's degree in Engineering in 2023. Worked on medical imaging AI and CT report analysis during his time in the lab.
bio_cn: AI4Rad Lab 校友。2023 年获工科硕士学位。在实验室期间从事医学影像人工智能与 CT 报告分析相关研究。
interests_en: CT report analysis with large language models
interests_cn: 基于大语言模型的 CT 报告分析
